EGFR T790M.reason: T790M gatekeeper mutation sterically blocks first-generation EGFR inhibitors
EGFR T790M.mechanism: Steric clash at ATP binding site

EGFR L858R.reason: L858R activating mutation sensitizes EGFR to TKI therapy

HIV K103N.reason: K103N prevents NNRTI binding by removing key hydrogen bond
HIV K103N.mechanism: Loss of H-bond to K103 backbone

HIV M184V.reason: M184V causes steric clash with 3TC/FTC oxathiolane ring

BRCA1 5382INSC.reason: BRCA1 frameshift creates PARP inhibitor synthetic lethality

TP53 R248W.reason: R248W hot-spot mutation abrogates DNA binding
TP53 R248W.mechanism: Loss of contact with DNA minor groove
